L1_headline: + SEM – John A. Saich disposed shares for tax withholding. | 08/01/25
L2_brief: John A. Saich, Executive Vice President of Select Medical Holdings, disposed of 21,745 shares at $12.57 per share on August 1, 2025. This was not a discretionary sale but rather a mandatory surrender of shares to cover tax withholding obligations upon the vesting of restricted stock, representing a routine compensation-related transaction.

L3_detailed.pattern_notes: This is a routine tax withholding transaction upon restricted stock vesting, not a discretionary sale. The disposed shares represent approximately 2.9% of post-transaction holdings, indicating a relatively small portion of total ownership used for tax purposes.
risks_flagged: Transaction is tax withholding related (Code F), not a voluntary sale — no negative signal
